extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL Remco won stage 3 with a solo attack inside 150m on the final climb to Arinsal, taking red jersey before crashing post-finish
tactical_patterns: CARUSO Damiano allowed 5+ minutes in break despite only 23sec GC gap, forcing Jumbo/Ineos chase instead of EF
KUSS Sepp made bridging attack for ROGLIC positioning, revealing Jumbo dual-leadership before expected mountain stages
VINGEGAARD Jonas couldn't close EVENEPOEL's inside-150m attack, suggesting uphill sprint weakness compared to sustained climbing

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: won from late attack and took red jersey, but post-finish barrier crash raises durability concerns
rider_signals.CARUSO Damiano: positive: teams respected his breakaway threat at only 23sec down, confirming GC form at age 35
rider_signals.KUSS Sepp: positive: made bridging attacks for ROGLIC, suggesting protected co-leadership role rather than pure domestique
rider_signals.LOPEZ Juan Pedro: positive: hung with GC group on category-1 finish despite Astana having race leader duties
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: negative: couldn't match EVENEPOEL's inside-150m uphill acceleration, only took 6sec bonus vs 10sec for winner
